name: downloaded-release-acceptance-flow
title: Establish downloaded release acceptance flow
description: Completed downloaded release acceptance for v2.4.13-beta.14 and established the reusable project release-testing contract.
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Test execution completed. Download, identity, SHA-256, Nexus signed redirects, and isolated packaged runtime passed; release acceptance failed on manifest/signature/native-signing gates, with Gatekeeper assessment blocked because host security assessment is disabled.

meta.nextAction: Review evidence/summary.json and open separate defect tasks only with user approval.
meta.blocker: Published release v2.4.13-beta.14 does not satisfy manifest/signature/macOS trust gates.
meta.evidence: evidence/summary.json plus seven bounded supporting JSON artifacts.
